context: Tests that the agent follows the legacy conversion workflow: validate current state, fix issues, apply formatting, add .PHONY, and re-validate. Also checks that .DELETE_ON_ERROR and tab indentation are addressed.

checklist.name: .PHONY added
checklist.description: The modernized Makefile includes a .PHONY declaration covering at least 'all', 'test', 'clean', and 'install'

checklist.name: .PHONY issue explained
checklist.description: modernization-notes.md explains that 'make clean' silently did nothing on machines with a file named 'clean', caused by missing .PHONY

checklist.name: Tab indentation present
checklist.description: Recipe lines in the modernized Makefile start with hard tab characters (the input used spaces/inconsistent indentation)

checklist.name: Validation step documented
checklist.description: modernization-notes.md describes running a validation step (make -n, validate_makefile.sh, or mbake) on the original Makefile before making changes

checklist.name: .DELETE_ON_ERROR added
checklist.description: The modernized Makefile includes .DELETE_ON_ERROR to clean up partial output files on failure

checklist.name: Re-validation documented
checklist.description: modernization-notes.md documents that the modernized Makefile was re-validated after changes

checklist.name: Format step mentioned
checklist.description: modernization-notes.md mentions using mbake format or equivalent formatting step as part of the modernization process

checklist.name: Changes enumerated
checklist.description: modernization-notes.md lists each specific change made (not just a generic summary)
